data.title: [af9e-77fc] GREEN: Run migration, delete S1 tooling, relocate allowlist, update config
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to do
Execute the migration and perform all cleanup operations.

## Steps

### Step 1: Dry-run preview
python3 scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py --dry-run --verbose plugins/dso/

### Step 2: Apply migration
python3 scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py plugins/dso/

### Step 3: Delete S1 migration script from plugin tree
rm plugins/dso/scripts/migrate_comment_refs.py

### Step 4: Relocate plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
mv plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf .claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
Update plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh to reference new location.
Update any other references to the old path.

### Step 5: Update config files
- plugins/dso/docs/workflow-config-schema.json: replace plugins/dso example with generic path
- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf comments: already relocated

### Step 6: Verify
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh  # must exit 0
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh  # must exit 0
python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py -v  # all pass
grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ --include="*.sh" | grep -v "^[^:]*:[^:]*:#"  # must be empty

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/migrate_comment_refs.py is DELETED
  Verify: ! test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/migrate_comment_refs.py
- [ ] plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf exists at .claude/hooks/pre-commit/
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
- [ ] plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf does NOT exist at plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/
  Verify: ! test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf
- [ ] Zero non-comment code-line plugins/dso refs in .sh files
  Verify: test -z "$(grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ --include="*.sh" | grep -v "^[^:]*:[^:]*:#")"
- [ ] Zero plugins/dso refs in .py files under plugins/dso/
  Verify: test -z "$(grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ --include="*.py")"
- [ ] workflow-config-schema.json has no plugins/dso examples
  Verify: ! grep -q "plugins/dso" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflow-config-schema.json
- [ ] S1 verification test passes without bypass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh
- [ ] S2 verification test passes
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
